summary: Audit Log Feature Testing Complete - All backend tests passed (15/15), frontend verified with Audit Log tab showing CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE badges, filters working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test entries created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing, automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Log feature fully tested and working. Backend: log_audit() calls in entries.py, cashbook.py, private_trading.py create audit logs for CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE operations. Frontend: Settings > Audit Log tab displays logs with filters (user, type, date). RecordHistory component shows per-record history. All 15 backend tests passed covering: mill entries CRUD audit, cash transactions CRUD audit, private paddy CRUD audit, audit log API with filters, per-record history API.
